second_review_reason: UniProtKB TrEMBL accession-level evidence is present but unreviewed; second reviewer must check species, taxid, gene/protein identity, accession provenance, and whether stronger source evidence is needed
required_second_review_checks: confirm target species and taxid; confirm gene symbol and protein name; confirm accession provenance; check whether reviewed UniProt, NCBI, Ensembl, OMA, OrthoDB, or primary literature supports the same target; record conflicts before any reviewed decision PR
forbidden_actions_after_second_review: ortholog acceptance; reviewed decision creation; Gate 4 or Gate 5 policy update; sequence fetch; Biohub call; embedding generation; Boltz call; AF3 call; Chai call; enrichment rerun; contrast rerun; Gate 8 promotion; Gate 9 promotion; biological claim
reviewer_note: Second-review scaffold only. G3SX30 remains an accession-level evidence candidate for MDM2 elephant and is not accepted or validated here.
